name: Shattered Steel
text: Find Superwoman and place her facedown under this card. Response: After you make a basic recovery, deal yourself 1 facedown encounter card, discard Superwoman, then remove this card from the game.

flavor: Lex Luthor has cloned Doomsday. This copy is after Steel.
name: Steel Trap
text: When Revealed: Place 1 threat here for each kinetic counter on Steel's Hammer.

name: Doomslayer
text: Guard. Toughness. Villainous. (When this minion activates, give it a boost card.) While Doomslayer is engaged with you, treat your identity's printed text box as if it were blank (except for traits). (Steel's nemesis minion.)

name: Entropy Surge
text:
Incite 2. (When revealed, place 2 threat on the main scheme.) When Revealed: Discard an upgrade or support you control. If no cards were discarded this way, this card gains surge.
[star] Boost: You are confused.

name: Sundered
text:
When Revealed: Take X damage, where X is the number of kinetic counters on Steel's Hammer. If X is 2 or less, this card gains surge.
[star] Boost: You are stunned.
